item.name: Hunmu Ob
item.description:
This boldly striped wavekin calls the waters of the Iq Br'aax reservoir home.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: The distinctive striped pattern of this wavekin functions as camouflage when swimming through sun-dappled waters. It is little wonder, then, that the Xbr'aal name for this fish means “hidden in white.”
